user.title: GPS Source Type
user.description: How does Home Assistant receive your RV's GPS coordinates?

device_tracker.title: Select GPS Entity
device_tracker.description: Choose the device_tracker or person entity that tracks your RV. It must have latitude and longitude attributes.

input_numbers.title: Select Coordinate Helpers
input_numbers.description: Choose the two input_number helpers that store your RV's latitude and longitude.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found in Home Assistant
error.no_coordinates: This entity does not have latitude/longitude attributes

abort.already_configured: Severe Weather RV Monitor is already configured

init.title: Update Settings
init.description: Adjust how frequently weather data is refreshed.
